#  Manage Rows & Columns in the Commitments Tool 
##  Background 
If you want to show, hide, group, sort, or size the columns in the Contracts table in the project's Commitments tool, there are a variety of operations you can use to organize your project's purchase orders and commitments.
##  Things to Consider 
  * **Required User Permissions:**
    * _To manage rows and columns_ , 'Read Only' level permissions or higher on the project's Commitments tool.


##  Prerequisites 
  * Create a Commitment


##  Steps 
  * Manage Table Settings
    * Row Height
    * Configure Columns
  * Manage Columns
    * Adjust Column Width
    * Arrange Columns
    * Sort Columns
    * Group Columns
    * Column Grouping Options
    * Additional Grouping Options
  * Overflow Menu
    * Pin Column
    * Autosize this Column
    * Autosize All Columns
    * Reset Columns


### Manage Table Settings
You can adjust row height and show/hide columns using the Table Settings options in the project's Commitments tool. First, click the **Table Settings** ![Icon Ag Grid Table Filter Menu](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/1d97a42d56d2f59a975b527692307cc9/3c57ff1f9a947f923873f16d23351fed/icon-ag-grid-table-filter-menu.png?fm=webp&h=15) icon on the top-right side of the Commitment tool's table. This reveals the Table Settings pane on the right side of the web page. To close the Table Settings pane, click the 'x' in the top-right corner.
![Ag Grid Open Table Settings](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/feea6722f30ef4b5229b56ae989bbd6a/67026a476cc635fa694db45d2763d665/ag-grid-open-table-settings.png?fm=webp)
The Table Setting pane has these options:
  * Row Height
  * Configure Columns


#### Row Height
Under **Row Height** , choose the _Small_ , _Medium_ , or _Large_ option button. Procore's default setting is _Medium_.![Ag Grid Resize Table Rows](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/7cda58403a18b350955b2fcc09010c20/c9d158e3c620166d3e322cb7300c076f/ag-grid-resize-table-rows.png?fm=webp)
#### Configure Columns
To choose the columns to show and hide, click the **Table Settings** ![Icon Ag Grid Table Filter Menu](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/1d97a42d56d2f59a975b527692307cc9/3c57ff1f9a947f923873f16d23351fed/icon-ag-grid-table-filter-menu.png?fm=webp&h=15) icon on the top-right side of the contracts table. This reveals the Table Settings pane on the right side of the web page. Under the **Configure Columns** area, move the toggle to the right to turn the column display ON. Procore's default setting is to show all available columns.
#####  Note
The Number ('#') and 'Contract Company' columns are required and cannot be hidden.
![Ag Grid Toggle Table Columns](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/ec947ef4c6b9143bbc8dcacb0dadc18c/53c282ebd045425ade08ed408736ec64/ag-grid-toggle-table-columns.png?fm=webp)
Other options in the Table Settings area include:
  * To hide a specific column, move the toggle to the left.
  * To show a specific column, move the toggle to the right.
  * To show all of the available columns, click the **Select All** link.
  * To restore Procore's default column settings, click the **Reset to Default** link.


### Manage Columns
#### Adjust Column Width
To adjust the width of a single column, hover your cursor over the right border of a column heading until the resize handle ![Icon Ag Grid Table Column Resize](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/02589e51ce0ff9cb331fde3feadf85e9/461a4df8be87c536ba8e4538eb133526/icon-ag-grid-table-column-resize.png?fm=webp&h=18) icon appears. Then drag the handle to the left or right to set the desired column width. If you press the SHIFT key while holding down the resize handle, a blue outline appears over the active column to help you see your column adjustment.
![Ag Grid Resize Table Columns](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/401f33d5f48a0b988177a0d245afbe36/967792663f1c906f8caacb5e652e5a79/ag-grid-resize-table-columns.png?fm=webp)
#### Arrange Columns
To move a column to another position in the table, click and hold the desired column's heading. Then use a drag-and-drop operation to place in the position you want.
#### Sort Columns
To sort the table's data by a specific column, click any column heading to reveal a BLUE arrow to adjust the sort order of the contracts table.
![Ag Grid Sort Table Columns](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/dc419d076346181243b0fbb45225fb0f/1dab284d8f41b228321cb982ea837206/ag-grid-sort-table-columns.png?fm=webp)  
| ![Icon Ag Grid Sort Ascending](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/1630d030d8e366336a40551664a8caf4/3f948b551a1787f9cb155594249121ae/icon-ag-grid-sort-ascending.png?fm=webp&h=14)  | Ascending  |  To reset your columns, hover your cursor over the right side of a column heading until the vertical ellipsis  ![Icon Ellipsis Options Menu](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/a96b8bda355760bcced149918284c761/d8f6ecf936a0d4af3a99066b425cadd2/icon-ellipsis-options-menu.png?fm=webp&h=16) appears. Then choose **Reset Columns** from the drop-down menu.  |  
| --- | --- | --- |  
| ![Icon Ag Grid Sort Descending](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/94ae05ceca562073aac3e7f21b90671b/adc961d5f4d0390bd53a0594f6c1ec90/icon-ag-grid-sort-descending.png?fm=webp&h=14)  | Descending  |  To reset your columns, hover your cursor over the right side of a column heading until the vertical ellipsis  ![Icon Ellipsis Options Menu](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/a96b8bda355760bcced149918284c761/d8f6ecf936a0d4af3a99066b425cadd2/icon-ellipsis-options-menu.png?fm=webp&h=16) appears. Then choose **Reset Columns** from the drop-down menu.  |  
#### Group Columns
Some columns let you group your table's data. Columns that can be grouped contain a grouping option in the Overflow Menu.
![Ag Grid Group Table Options](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/990842579286016230af4b625b8aa3aa/6c4b03f9a7fcb1a34fc66e6b31bdf0fd/ag-grid-group-table-options.png?fm=webp)
##### Column Grouping Options
Simply hover your mouse cursor over one of these columns until the vertical ellipsis ![Icon Ellipsis Options Menu](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/a96b8bda355760bcced149918284c761/d8f6ecf936a0d4af3a99066b425cadd2/icon-ellipsis-options-menu.png?fm=webp&h=16) appears. Then click the ellipsis and select the column grouping option of your choice. You can apply multiple grouping options to your table.  
| Contract Company  | Group by Contract Company  | Groups purchase orders and subcontracts by the 'Contracts Company' designated in each contract. See [Create a Purchase Order](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/commitments-project/tutorials/create-a-purchase-order) and [Create a Subcontract](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/commitments-project/tutorials/create-a-subcontract).  |  
| --- | --- | --- |  
| Status  | Group by Status  | Groups purchase orders and subcontracts by status. To learn more, see [What are the default commitment statuses in Procore?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-what-are-the-default-commitment-statuses-in-procore)  |  
| Executed  | Group by Executed  | Groups purchase orders and subcontracts by their state: Yes (executed) or No (not executed). See [Edit a Commitment](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/commitments-project/tutorials/edit-a-commitment).  |  
##### Additional Grouping Options
After you apply your grouping options, a drop-down menu appears above the table. This menu lets you add, remove, arrange, and reset your table's groupings.
  * To change the row group order, grab a group label by its **Reorder Grip** ![Icon Reorder Grip](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/1dd0b6158ae899c165fa049f87185745/e6cd55122208aa3c2cb2559eb34ae69d/icon-reorder-grip.png?fm=webp&h=14) and drag it into the desired position.  
![Ag Grid Reorder Table Grouping Filters](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/a48d7336c69e8f0e857396bdc299baf5/9d8b051ea0e6163880b90909b3bcbe59/ag-grid-reorder-table-grouping-filters.png?fm=webp)
  * To remove a single option, click the 'x' next to the option to remove.  
![Ag Grid Remove Table Grouping Filter](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/eb9cac23768d37153fd4a43f5d64352b/8e2c838d690afc0553ecb18509b3191e/ag-grid-remove-table-grouping-filter.png?fm=webp)
  * To apply an available grouping option, click an option highlighted in GRAY.  
![Ag Grid Apply Table Grouping Filter](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/b4df62dc1405e56789798b93b381deb6/aeb9959f332585507082a36c80997db5/ag-grid-apply-table-grouping-filter.png?fm=webp)
  * To restore Procore's default settings, click **Reset** in the drop-down menu.  
![Ag Grid Reset Table Grouping Filters](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/ed7ff3b374ff044f7557f777bfb1e410/08bf6a0ebf4348127aeaea80124c871f/ag-grid-reset-table-grouping-filters.png?fm=webp)


### Overflow Menu
To open a drop-down menu with additional column options, hover your cursor over the right side of a column heading until a vertical ellipsis ![Icon Ellipsis Options Menu](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/a96b8bda355760bcced149918284c761/d8f6ecf936a0d4af3a99066b425cadd2/icon-ellipsis-options-menu.png?fm=webp&h=16) appears. Then click the vertical ellipsis ![Icon Ellipsis Options Menu](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/a96b8bda355760bcced149918284c761/d8f6ecf936a0d4af3a99066b425cadd2/icon-ellipsis-options-menu.png?fm=webp&h=16) to reveal an Overflow menu with the additional options. The options are pictured below.
![Ag Grid View More Table Options](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/3a1f4a65feaeb2109194f5fc7dc6e5d4/5f2cde417b9bafe33d32570fc9feffbf/ag-grid-view-more-table-options.png?fm=webp)
The Overflow menu includes these options:
  * Pin Column
  * Autosize this Column
  * Autosize All Columns
  * Reset Columns


#### Pin Column
To keep data columns in the Contracts table from moving when you scroll, you can pin a column to freeze it in place. To do this, hover your cursor over the right side of a column heading unit the vertical ellipsis ![Icon Ellipsis Options Menu](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/a96b8bda355760bcced149918284c761/d8f6ecf936a0d4af3a99066b425cadd2/icon-ellipsis-options-menu.png?fm=webp&h=16) appears. Next, click the vertical ellipsis ![Icon Ellipsis Options Menu](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/a96b8bda355760bcced149918284c761/d8f6ecf936a0d4af3a99066b425cadd2/icon-ellipsis-options-menu.png?fm=webp&h=16) and choose **Pin Column**. Then choose one of these options:
  * To pin a column on the left side of the table, choose **Pin Left**.
  * To pin a column on the left side of the table, choose **Pin Right**. 
#####  Tip
    * Procore pins columns to the left or right side of the page in the order columns are pinned.
    * You can rearrange your pinned columns by dragging and dropping a column into the desired position.
    * You can pin columns to both the left and right side of the table.
  * To remove all pins, choose **No Pin**.


#### Autosize this Column
To automatically set the width of a column to match its contents, hover your cursor over the right side of a column heading until the vertical ellipsis ![Icon Ellipsis Options Menu](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/a96b8bda355760bcced149918284c761/d8f6ecf936a0d4af3a99066b425cadd2/icon-ellipsis-options-menu.png?fm=webp&h=16) appears. Then click the vertical ellipsis ![Icon Ellipsis Options Menu](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/a96b8bda355760bcced149918284c761/d8f6ecf936a0d4af3a99066b425cadd2/icon-ellipsis-options-menu.png?fm=webp&h=16) and select the **Autosize This Column** option from the drop-down menu.
#### Autosize All Columns
To automatically set the width of all columns in the table to best match the contents, hover your cursor over the right side of a column heading until the vertical ellipsis ![Icon Ellipsis Options Menu](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/a96b8bda355760bcced149918284c761/d8f6ecf936a0d4af3a99066b425cadd2/icon-ellipsis-options-menu.png?fm=webp&h=16) appears. Then click the vertical ellipsis ![Icon Ellipsis Options Menu](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/a96b8bda355760bcced149918284c761/d8f6ecf936a0d4af3a99066b425cadd2/icon-ellipsis-options-menu.png?fm=webp&h=16) and select the **Autosize All Columns** option from the drop-down menu.
#### Reset Columns
To reset the table's columns to Procore's default settings, hover your cursor over the right side of a column heading until the vertical ellipsis ![Icon Ellipsis Options Menu](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/a96b8bda355760bcced149918284c761/d8f6ecf936a0d4af3a99066b425cadd2/icon-ellipsis-options-menu.png?fm=webp&h=16) appears. Then click the vertical ellipsis ![Icon Ellipsis Options Menu](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/a96b8bda355760bcced149918284c761/d8f6ecf936a0d4af3a99066b425cadd2/icon-ellipsis-options-menu.png?fm=webp&h=16) and select the **Reset Columns** option from the drop-down menu. This resets all of your column settings to Procore's default settings.
##  Next Steps 
  * [Search for and Apply Filters to the Commitments Tool](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/commitments-project/tutorials/search-for-and-apply-filters-to-the-commitments-tool)

title: Manage Rows & Columns in the Commitments Tool
description: How to manage rows and columns in the project's Commitments tool.
